sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_reverse (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_array_reverse VALUES (1, [1, null, 3, null, 5]), (2, [null, null, 2, 4]);
UPDATE test_array_reverse SET values = arrayReverseFill(x -> isNull(x), values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayReverseFill(x -> not isNull(x), values) AS reversed_values FROM test_array_reverse;
SELECT arrayReverseFill(x -> x < 5, [10, 9, 8, 3, 2, 1, null]) AS filled_array;
